transcript.final_response: Done. Created `/tmp/project.tar.gz`, extracted it into `/backup`, and verified that `/backup/project` exists with files matching `/project`.
tool_calls:
set -e
# Create tar.gz archive of /project, preserving directory contents under project/
tar -czf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C / project

# Create /backup and extract archive there
mkdir -p /backup
tar -xzf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C /backup

# Verify archive and extracted files/directories exist
echo "Archive:"
ls -l /tmp/project.tar.gz

echo "\nExtracted backup contents:"
find /backup -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 3 -print | sort

# Basic verification that /backup/project exists and contains entries matching /project
if [[ -d /backup/project ]]; then
  echo "\nVerification: /backup/project exists."
else
  echo "Verification failed: /backup/project does not exist." >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Compare file list relative paths between source and extracted copy
src_list=$(mktemp)
bak_list=$(mktemp)
find /project -printf '%P\n' | sort > "$src_list"
find /backup/project -printf '%P\n' | sort > "$bak_list"
if diff -u "$src_list" "$bak_list"; then
  echo "Verification: extracted file list matches /project."
else
  echo "Verification failed: extracted file list differs from /project." >&2
  exit 1
fi

set -e
# Ensure archive exists and backup extraction exists
test -f /tmp/project.tar.gz
test -d /backup/project

# Verify by comparing relative paths (portable path stripping)
src_list=$(mktemp)
bak_list=$(mktemp)
find /project | sed 's#^/project##' | sort > "$src_list"
find /backup/project | sed 's#^/backup/project##' | sort > "$bak_list"

echo "Archive created:"
ls -l /tmp/project.tar.gz

echo "Backup files:"
find /backup -mindepth 1 -print | sort

if diff -u "$src_list" "$bak_list"; then
  echo "Verification successful: files exist in /backup and match /project."
else
  echo "Verification failed: /backup/project differs from /project." >&2
  exit 1
fi
